_comment: PLACEHOLDER - Draft geometry. Replace with actual boundaries from USFS, PADUS, or Minnesota DNR.

properties.label: Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wilderness (BWCAW)
properties.managing_agency: U.S. Forest Service - Superior National Forest
properties.significance: Largest wilderness area east of the Rockies. No motorized equipment, no mining. Federal mineral withdrawal debated 2017-2022. Directly north and northeast of proposed copper sulfide projects.
properties.source: PLACEHOLDER - replace with PADUS or USFS official boundary shapefile

properties.label: Superior National Forest (non-Wilderness portions)
properties.significance: Surrounds BWCAW; mineral leasing permissible but subject to USFS review. Copper sulfide projects within SNF require federal permits including USFS special use authorization.
properties.source: PLACEHOLDER - replace with USFS official boundary

properties.label: Voyageurs National Park
properties.significance: Northwest of BWCAW; water quality in connected watershed. Mining prohibited within park boundary.
properties.source: PLACEHOLDER - replace with NPS official boundary
